<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 9722 => 'ירושלים', 9723 => 'תל אביב-יפו והמרכז', 9724 => 'חיפה והצפון', 9728 => 'השפלה והדרום', 9729 => 'השרון', ];
